test_groups.title: Default options
test_groups.rationale: Default behavior should validate URLs with supported protocols and basic structure.

test_groups.title: require_protocol: true
test_groups.rationale: When require_protocol is true, URLs must include a protocol.

test_groups.title: require_tld: false
test_groups.rationale: When require_tld is false, URLs without a top-level domain should be valid.

test_groups.title: allow_underscores: true
test_groups.rationale: When allow_underscores is true, underscores in the domain should be allowed.

test_groups.title: host_whitelist
test_groups.rationale: When host_whitelist is set, only URLs with whitelisted hosts should be valid.

test_groups.title: host_blacklist
test_groups.rationale: When host_blacklist is set, URLs with blacklisted hosts should be invalid.

test_groups.title: allow_trailing_dot: true
test_groups.rationale: When allow_trailing_dot is true, domains ending with a dot should be valid.

test_groups.title: allow_protocol_relative_urls: true
test_groups.rationale: When allow_protocol_relative_urls is true, protocol-relative URLs should be valid.

test_groups.title: allow_fragments: false
test_groups.rationale: When allow_fragments is false, URLs with fragments should be invalid.

test_groups.title: allow_query_components: false
test_groups.rationale: When allow_query_components is false, URLs with query components should be invalid.

test_groups.title: disallow_auth: true
test_groups.rationale: When disallow_auth is true, URLs with authentication components should be invalid.
